'''tanunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cablecar|cablecar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-n-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cablecar|cablecar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tanunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæninith|tæninith]] || [[word:tæninij|tæninij]] || [[word:tæninish|tæninish]] || [[word:tænini|tænini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tanununuth|tanununuth]] || [[word:tanununuj|tanununuj]] || [[word:tanununush|tanununush]] || [[word:tanununu|tanununu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tanunuth|tanunuth]] || [[word:tanunuj|tanunuj]] || [[word:tanunush|tanunush]] || [[word:tanunu|tanunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tanufnuth|tanufnuth]] || [[word:tanufnuj|tanufnuj]] || [[word:tanufnush|tanufnush]] || [[word:tanufnuf|tanufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tanunuthu|tanunuthu]] || [[word:tanunuju|tanunuju]] || [[word:tanunushu|tanunushu]] || [[word:tanunuku|tanunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tanunuth|tanunuth]] || [[word:tanunuj|tanunuj]] || [[word:tanunush|tanunush]] || [[word:tanunu|tanunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tanunuthul|tanunuthul]] || [[word:tanunujul|tanunujul]] || [[word:tanunushul|tanunushul]] || [[word:tanunukul|tanunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tanunuthuthu|tanunuthuthu]] || [[word:tanunujuju|tanunujuju]] || [[word:tanunushushu|tanunushushu]] || [[word:tanunuku|tanunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tanunuthun|tanunuthun]] || [[word:tanunujun|tanunujun]] || [[word:tanunushun|tanunushun]] || [[word:tanunukun|tanunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tanunuthuoro|tanunuthuoro]] || [[word:tanunujuoro|tanunujuoro]] || [[word:tanunushuoro|tanunushuoro]] || [[word:tanunukuoro|tanunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
